summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily LLY Bull 2X ETF (ELIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Eli Lilly and Company stock. ELIL was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: ELIL is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
